mapper.select: select count(*) from tb_make_info where weigh_id = #{weighId}

select a.order_dist ,a.phase ,a.item_cd ,dbo.getItemName(a.item_cd) as item_name ,a.order_qty ,a.make_qty ,a.make_time ,a.make_yn ,a.maker ,a.make_confirmer ,a.weigh_id ,a.work_proc_id ,a.work_batch_id from tb_weigh_info a where a.work_proc_id = #{workProcId}
select weigh_qty as weighQty from tb_weigh_info where weigh_id = #{weighId}

select make_etc_id ,work_proc_id ,item_cd ,bom_ver ,maker ,confirmer ,mat_Proc ,manipulate ,process_Time ,significant ,note ,filter_cnt ,filter_Type ,filter_Damage ,substance_check from tb_make_etc where work_proc_id = #{workProcId}
